item.title: Chris_Nighty: Chris Nightingale @Chris_Nighty · 2min Thoroughly enjoyed a first visit to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium yesterday. Incr
item.description: Chris Nightingale @Chris_Nighty · 2min Thoroughly enjoyed a first visit to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium yesterday. Incredible noise at times and some great goals. Looking forward to Tuesday vs. Chelsea #bhafc #thfc 0:04 15

item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 20min Pep Guardiola on Bernardo Silva: “Part of myself is leaving too”.
“It'll be di
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 20min Pep Guardiola on Bernardo Silva: “Part of myself is leaving too”.
“It'll be difficult to imagine without him. On and off the pitch, during nine years, he's been massively, massively, massively important”. 392 380 5 mil 97 mil

item.title: FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 41min Roberto de Zerbi: “We have to improve a lot of things. The crucial part is to k
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 41min Roberto de Zerbi: “We have to improve a lot of things. The crucial part is to keep this mentality and I told the players to come on Monday afternoon with the same behaviour they showed against Brighton”.
“I don't want to work with sad people, with negative people”. 348 206 2 mil 125 mil

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 41min Arsenal's results in the Premier League in April since Mikel Arteta took
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 41min Arsenal's results in the Premier League in April since Mikel Arteta took charge in December 2019:
2021:
Arsenal 0-3 Liverpool Sheffield United 0-3 Arsenal Arsenal 1-1 Fulham Arsenal 0-1 Everton
2022: Crystal Palace 3-0 Arsenal Arsenal 1-2 Brighton
Mostrar más 9 20 87 16 mil
